## What

<!-- One paragraph: what changed and why. Focus on the problem solved, not the implementation. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Docs / chore

## Scope

- [ ] Frontend only (`apps/frontend`)
- [ ] Backend only (`apps/backend`)
- [ ] Shared (`packages/shared`)
- [ ] Cross-workspace

## Checklist

- [ ] Lint + build pass for affected scope (`pnpm --filter <workspace> run lint && build`)
- [ ] No secrets committed (`.env`, tokens, credentials)
- [ ] Pre-commit hooks passed (no `--no-verify`)
- [ ] Screenshots / GIF attached for UI changes
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated if this is a user-facing change
